security {
    address-book {
        global {
            address inside_net 192.168.10.0/24;
        }
    }
    policies {
        from-zone trust to-zone untrust {
            policy allow-web {
                match {
                    source-address any;
                    destination-address any;
                    application junos-http;
                }
                then { permit; }
            }
        }
    }
}
